name: cron-ai
description: Cron Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: parse_cron
tools.description: Parse a cron expression into its components with validation.

tools.name: generate_cron
tools.description: Generate a cron expression. Use preset for common schedules: every_5min, every_hour, daily_midnight, weekly_monday, monthly_first, weekdays_9am.

tools.name: next_runs
tools.description: Calculate next N run times for a cron expression.

tools.name: explain_cron
tools.description: Explain a cron expression in human-readable English.
